titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 5965

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=766 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 21:10:50.66686+00 | translation moa=767 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 21:10:50.67455+00

p.cl: . Omnibus Christi fidelibus ad quos presentes littere peruenerint . Simon filius Elye de Prendergest salutem .

me dedisse . concessisse . et hac presenti carta mea confirmasse pro me et heredibus meis in perpetuum . deo et
beato Cuthberto et beate Ebbe de Coldingham . et monachis ibidem deo seruientibus et seruituris . pro salute anime mee et ante
cessorum meorum . et pro quadam summa pecunie quam prior et conuentus de Coldingham mihi in necessitate mea premanibus pacauerunt
decem acras terre in cultura de Coteflat cum vno tofto et crofto vnius accre terre . ex occidentali parte gardini Ricardi
fratris mei que Idem Ricardus mihi dedit pro homagio et seruicio meo . Tenendas et habendas dictis monachis et eorum successoribus
adeo libere et quiete sicut ego aliquo tempore predictam terram tenui . Ego vero Simon et heredes mei predictam terram
cum omnibus pertinenciis suis infra villam et extra sine aliquo retinemento predictis monachis contra omnes homines
et feminas in perpetuum Warantizabimus .

Et vt hec mea donacio . et carte confirmacio robur optineant
perpetuum huic carte sigillum meum apposui .

Hiis testibus . dominis . dauid de Graham tunc vicecomite de Berewic . dauid . de
hadingtona . Radulfo Nobili . Alano de Harecar’ . Willelmo de Scremerstona . Adam de Morh’ . Roberto de Pauxtona . Adam filio Iohannis
de Aytona . Adam filio Walteri de eadem . Patricio Scot . Patricio filio Coleman de Aldecambus et ALIIS .
To all Christ's faithful to whom these present letters shall have come, Simon son of Elias of Prenderguest sends greeting.

to have given, granted, and by this my present charter to have made firm, for myself and for my heirs for ever, to God and to the blessed Cuthbert and the blessed Æbbe of Coldingham, and to the monks in that place serving God now and in the future, for the salvatino of my soul and of my ancestors', and in return for a certain sum of money which the prior and convent of Coldingham paid to me as a downpayment in my need, ten acres of land in the ploughland at Coteflat with one toft and croft of one acre of land on the western side of my brother Richard's garden, which the same Richard gave to me in return for my homage and service; for the said monks and their successrs to hold and to have as freely and quitely as I held the aforesaid land at any time. And I, Simon, and my heirs shall warrant the aforesaid land to the aforesaid monks against all men, with all its pertinents inside and outside the toun, without any withholding.
And so that this my donation and confirmation should possess the perpetual strength of a charter, I have applied my seal to this charter.

With these witnesses, the lords David of Graham, then sheriff of Berwick, David of Haddington, Ralph Noble, Alan of Harcarse, William of Scremerston, Adam of Morham, Robert of Paxton, Adam son of John of Ayton, Adam son of Walter of the same, Patrick Scot, Patrick son of Colman of Oldcambus, and others.
